Error_Code_Comments.Tool_Comments: For details about the tool and how error codes are generated, please visit https://azurecsi.visualstudio.com/DuvallFw/_git/1pfw.error_code_generator
Error_Code_Comments.Facility_Value_Comments: Service Facilities must be in the range 51 - 99. Core Facilities must be in the range 100 - 150
Error_Code_Comments.Error_Value_Comments: For a given facility, Error codes must be a decimal value with no specifier at the end. For example, 0x2012 or 2012U or 2019L etc are NOT allowed and no expressions either. Error code is a 16 bit number

Error_Codes.Facility_Description: This is for Generic error codes

Errors.Name: KNG_E_INVALIDARG
Errors.Description: One or more arguments are invalid

Errors.Name: KNG_E_PENDING
Errors.Description: The data necessary to complete this operation is not yet available.

Errors.Name: KNG_E_NOT_READY
Errors.Description: Device or module is not ready

Error_Codes.Facility_Description: This is for crash dump library error codes.

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_UNUSED_ERROR
Errors.Description: Do not use, defined to prevent use of 0 as error code.

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_DEFAULT_EXCEPTION
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by a default exception

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_HARDFAULT_EXCEPTION
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by a hard fault exception

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_MEMORYMANAGEMENT_EXCEPTION
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by a memory management exception

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_BUSFAULT_EXCEPTION
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by a bus fault exception

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_USAGEFAULT_EXCEPTION
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by a usage fault exception

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_WDT_TIMEOUT
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by WDT timeout

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_EXTERNAL_REQUEST
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by external request (eg: BMC)

Errors.Name: KNG_CD_THREAD_STACK_ERROR
Errors.Description: Crash dump caused by TX thread stack error Bug Check

Error_Codes.Facility_Description: This is for Bug Check library error codes.

Errors.Name: KNG_BGCHK_UNUSED_ERROR
Errors.Description: Do not use, defined to prevent use of 0 as error code.

Errors.Name: KNG_BGCHK_ASSERT
Errors.Description: Bug assert in a debug build

Errors.Name: KNG_BGCHK_BUGCHECK
Errors.Description: Bug check due to a condition evaluating to false

Errors.Name: KNG_BGCHK_BUGLOG
Errors.Description: Bug Log due to a condition evaluating to false. Trace event gets generated

Error_Codes.Facility_Description: This is for error codes within SOC power module

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_UNUSED_ERROR
Errors.Description: Do not use, defined to prevent use of 0 as error code.

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_LDO_MVOLT_CONV
Errors.Description: Error using fused values for LDODAC to mV conversion

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_GEN_VFT
Errors.Description: Error using fused values to generate VFT

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_CURVE_ASSIGNMENT
Errors.Description: Fused curve assignment for core out of bounds

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_WARMSTART_DATA_MISSING
Errors.Description: Warmstart data not present on warmstart

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_WARMSTART_DATA_VERSION
Errors.Description: Warmstart data found, but too small to contain version info

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_WARMSTART_DATA_UNKNOWN
Errors.Description: Warmstart data found, but doesn't match a known version

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_L2V_SLOPE
Errors.Description: LDODAC to voltage gradient is missing

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_DTS_Y
Errors.Description: DTS Y coefficient is 0 (would cause div by 0)

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_TDP_NUM_CORES
Errors.Description: TDP num cores 0 (would cause div by 0)

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_INVALID_NOMINAL
Errors.Description: Fuse or knob override of nominal pstate not supported by all cores

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_FUSE_UNSUPPORTED_PMMREV
Errors.Description: Fused PMM rev not known by FW

Errors.Name: KNG_SC_NO_VALID_PSTATES
Errors.Description: Fused curve has no valid pstates

Error_Codes.Facility_Description: This is for Health Monitor library error codes.

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_UNUSED_ERROR
Errors.Description: Do not use, defined to prevent use of 0 as error code.

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_SCF_CE
Errors.Description: Correctable Error in SCP SCF RAM

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_SCF_UE
Errors.Description: Uncorrectable Error in SCP SCF RAM

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_SCF_OF
Errors.Description: Overflow Error in SCP SCF RAM

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_DCACHE_TAG_UE
Errors.Description: Uncorrectable Error in Data Tag Cache

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_DCACHE_TAG_CE
Errors.Description: Correctable Error in Data Tag Cache

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_ICACHE_TAG_UE
Errors.Description: Uncorrectable Error in Instruction Tag Cache

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_ICACHE_TAG_CE
Errors.Description: Correctable Error in Instruction Tag Cache

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_RSM_UE
Errors.Description: Uncorrectable Error in Shared SRAM, RSM

Errors.Name: KNG_HM_RSM_CE
Errors.Description: Correctable Error in Shared SRAM, RSM
